description_long: This object is a modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rounded ceramic bowl and an attached cistern at the rear. The cistern is cylindrical and elevated, connected to the bowl by a thick, ribbed pipe, which is visually prominent from the side and rear views. The toilet features a standard oval seat and lid, both of which are raised, revealing the open bowl. The surface is glossy and smooth, predominantly white with some black or dark gray accents on the pipe and flush button. The flush mechanism is visible on top of the cistern, likely operated by a button. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for installation in public or private urban restrooms.
description: A glossy white, floor-mounted toilet with a raised seat, exposed cistern, and a prominent ribbed pipe connecting the tank to the bowl.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open oval seat and bowl, with the lid raised and the cistern partially visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the raised seat, the full profile of the bowl, and the ribbed pipe connecting the exposed cistern to the bowl.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cylindrical cistern, the flush button on top, and the ribbed pipe extending downward to the bowl.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the seat, bowl, and the ribbed pipe from a different angle, with the cistern and flush button visible.
